headlines.title: Opening Day Just 3 Days Away; Roster Decisions Finalized
headlines.summary: The Mariners are just three sleeps away from Opening Day on March 26 against Cleveland. Final roster decisions made, Colt Emerson reassigned to minors.

headlines.title: Seahawks Exercise Fifth-Year Options on JSN and Devon Witherspoon
headlines.summary: Seahawks lock in 2023 first-rounders through 2027. JSN's option: $23.85M, Witherspoon's: $21.16M. Both fully guaranteed.

headlines.title: Kraken Lose 5-2 to Blue Jackets - Playoff Hopes Fading
headlines.summary: Third straight loss. Now 2 points behind Nashville for final playoff spot with 13 games remaining. Jared McCann injured.

last_game.highlights: Third straight loss, playoff hopes fading

headlines.title: Sounders Advance to Concacaf Champions Cup Quarterfinals
headlines.summary: Beat Vancouver 5-2 on aggregate. Play Minnesota United today at 11:30 AM PT. Will face Tigres UANL next.
